list.title: API Connections
list.description: Manage your command center's peripheral nervous system. Monitor platform health, verify secure OAuth 2.0 handshake status, and ensure data pipelines are synchronized.
list.uptimeDesc: Enterprise reliability protocols are active across all regional data centers.

detail.autoRefreshNote: Tokens automatically refresh if valid within 14 days of expiry.
detail.networkApiDetail: Latency: 42ms. Region: AWS-US-EAST-1. No packet loss detected in the last 24 hours.
detail.disconnectDesc: This action will immediately terminate all active campaigns, scheduled posts, and real-time analytics tracking. This cannot be undone.
detail.managementSubtitle: Manage global enterprise tokens and permission scopes for {{channel}}.

error.title: YouTube API Connection Failed
error.description: The bridge between Campaign Studio and YouTube Data v3 has been severed. Campaign synchronizations, real-time analytics, and content uploads are currently suspended.
error.failureDesc: The connection was dropped unexpectedly at 03:42:11 PM UTC. Initial retry logic failed due to 'Invalid Grant' response from Google Auth Servers.

restored.title: {{channel}} Connection Restored
restored.body: The {{channel}} integration is now active and healthy. Your creative pipeline is fully synchronized.
restored.description: The bridge between Campaign Studio and YouTube Data v3 is now active and healthy. Your creative pipeline is fully synchronized.
